name: Coconut Creamy Bon Bons
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except chocolate together in a bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into balls about the size of a hickory nut.
3. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
4. Melt the dipping chocolate over hot water in a double boiler.
5. Dip the balls into the melted chocolate and place them on wax paper-covered cookie sheets.
6. Store the bon bons in a cool, dry place.
Makes enough to fill a 1-pound tin.
